mapper.select: SELECT m.MENU_ID AS ID, m.MENU_NAME, '0' AS UP_MENU_ID, 'M' AS MENU_TYPE, m.MENU_ID FROM (SELECT DISTINCT m1.MENU_ID,m1.MENU_NAME,m1.MENU_ORDER,m1.UP_MENU_ID FROM admin_sm_menu m1 LEFT JOIN admin_sm_res_contr t ON m1.FUNC_ID = t.FUNC_ID WHERE m1.SYS_ID =#{sysId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND t.CONTR_ID IN (SELECT CONTR_ID FROM admin_sm_data_auth) ORDER BY m1.UP_MENU_ID,m1.MENU_ORDER) m

SELECT t.CONTR_ID AS ID, t.CONTR_NAME AS MENU_NAME,m.MENU_ID AS UP_MENU_ID,'C' AS MENU_TYPE, m.MENU_ID FROM admin_sm_res_contr t LEFT JOIN admin_sm_menu m ON m.FUNC_ID = t.FUNC_ID WHERE m.SYS_ID = #{sysId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND t.CONTR_ID IN (SELECT CONTR_ID FROM admin_sm_data_auth)

SELECT d.AUTH_ID AS ID, d.AUTH_TMPL_NAME AS MENU_NAME, d.CONTR_ID AS UP_MENU_ID, 'D' AS MENU_TYPE,d.MENU_ID FROM (SELECT t.AUTH_ID, t.CONTR_ID, t1.AUTH_TMPL_NAME, t2.MENU_ID FROM admin_sm_data_auth t LEFT JOIN (SELECT t.CONTR_ID, m.MENU_ID FROM admin_sm_res_contr t LEFT JOIN admin_sm_menu m ON m.FUNC_ID = t.FUNC_ID WHERE m.SYS_ID = #{sysId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND t.CONTR_ID IN (SELECT CONTR_ID FROM admin_sm_data_auth)) t2 ON t2.CONTR_ID = t.CONTR_ID LEFT JOIN admin_sm_data_auth_tmpl t1 ON t.AUTH_TMPL_ID = t1.AUTH_TMPL_ID) d
SELECT r.AUTH_RECO_ID, r.AUTHOBJ_ID, r.MENU_ID, t.AUTH_TMPL_NAME, t.AUTH_TMPL_ID FROM admin_sm_auth_reco r LEFT JOIN admin_sm_data_auth_tmpl t ON r.AUTHRES_ID = t.AUTH_TMPL_ID ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT r.auth_reco_id as auth_id, r.sys_id, c.contr_id, c.contr_url, t.auth_tmpl_id, t.sql_string, t.sql_name, t.priority FROM admin_sm_auth_reco r LEFT JOIN admin_sm_data_auth_tmpl t ON r.authres_id = t.auth_tmpl_id LEFT JOIN admin_sm_res_contr c ON r.menu_id = c.contr_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
